race.description: Girls Day Out 7 March F&M Maiden Plate
race.comment: KHOIRGIRL (2) has placed four of five to date including one over this track and trip two back. Gets some weight relief with the 2kg claim and only needs some luck navigating from the sticky draw to be playing a major role in the outcome. The well-bred MARUNOUCHI (7) (out of the G1 placed mare Sezanne) is facing the starter for the first time but is sure to be well-educated out of the Gollan yard and draws low in gate two. Keep very safe. The well-related TSZYUYA (3) (half to G2 winner Amazonian Lass) strips fitter second-up from the spell and may earn some minor money. EDGE OF INFINITY (4) put the writing on the wall when placed last start and could be ready to peak fourth up.
